setup.title: Set up your account
setup.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address
setup.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 12 characters
setup.passwordMissingDigit: Password must include at least one number
setup.passwordMissingLowercase: Password must include at least one lowercase letter
setup.passwordMissingUppercase: Password must include at least one uppercase letter
setup.passwordMissingNonAlphanumeric: Password must include at least one special character

setup.auth.setup.is_not_completed: Setup is not completed. Please complete the setup to continue.
setup.auth.setup.already_been_completed: Setup has already been completed. Please log in to continue.
